timestamp.description: Unix timestamp in seconds at which the last activity occurred.

blockNumber.description: Block height at which the last activity occurred.

txHash.description: Transaction hash of the transaction that created or consumed the address' UTXOs.

utxoId.description: UTXO ID of the UTXO that was created or consumed.

isConsumed.description: Whether the last activity was a consumption of an existing UTXO.
